title: AI Knows More Than You Think
modules: How Your Data Becomes AI Training
Your Digital Footprint Is Bigger Than You Know
How AI Profiles and Targets You
When Algorithms Make Decisions About You
Your Rights: What the Law Actually Says
synopsis: You've grown up online, which means AI systems have been learning from you — your clicks, your searches, your posts — for years. This course shows you what's actually been collected, how it's used to influence you, and what you can do about it.
rationale: Young adults are the most data-exposed demographic yet often the least informed about how that data shapes the AI decisions that affect their feeds, opportunities, and even job prospects.
learning_outcome: After this course, you can conduct a personal data audit, identify where your information is being used by AI systems, and take concrete steps to protect your privacy and understand your rights.
